summary: Iteration 134: Tested Batch 2 features - 3D Spatial Audio in VR (Web Audio PannerNode), Virtualized Lists in SacredTexts.js (react-window FixedSizeList), and WebXR HMD Gaze Reticle with fuse interaction. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 2 features tested. VR page at /vr has: 1) Gaze reticle (data-testid='gaze-reticle') - 8x8px center dot with SVG progress ring for fuse interaction, 2) Spatial audio indicator (data-testid='spatial-audio-indicator') appears after clicking audio toggle button (data-testid='vr-audio-btn'), 3) Portal legend labels at bottom showing all 7 portals (Meditation, Quantum Field, Breathwork, Yoga, Star Chart, Oracle, Teachings), 4) Instructions text mentions 'gaze at portals to enter'. Sacred Texts page at /sacred-texts has: 1) Virtualized text grid using react-window FixedSizeList for 15+ texts, 2) Virtualized chapter list for texts with many chapters, 3) Search input (data-testid='sacred-search') filters texts by title/tradition/region, 4) Clicking text card opens detail panel with chapter list, 5) Clicking chapter opens inline reader with VR mode button and Listen (narrate) button.

gaze_reticle.description: 8x8px center dot with SVG progress ring for HMD fuse interaction

spatial_audio_indicator.description: Appears after clicking audio toggle, shows '3D Spatial Audio' label with pulsing dot

instructions_text.text: Drag to orbit · Scroll to zoom · Click or gaze at portals to enter

spatial_audio_implementation.description: Web Audio PannerNode with HRTF panning model, inverse distance model, listener position synced to camera in animation loop
spatial_audio_implementation.code_location: VirtualReality.js lines 110-178 (toggleAudio), lines 498-522 (animation loop listener sync)

gaze_fuse_implementation.description: 1500ms fuse timer (GAZE_FUSE_MS), progress tracked via gazeProgress state, SVG ring shows progress, triggers portal activation on complete
gaze_fuse_implementation.code_location: VirtualReality.js lines 50-54 (refs/constants), lines 593-628 (fuse detection in animation loop), lines 1062-1078 (trigger handler)

search_input.description: Filters texts by title, tradition, or region

usage: VirtualizedTextGrid for text cards (ROW_HEIGHT=180, skips virtualization for ≤9 items)
ChapterList for chapters (ITEM_HEIGHT=72, skips virtualization for ≤6 items)
